## Summary

Describe the user-visible or maintainer-visible outcome and link the related issue or discussion when applicable.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the automated checks relevant to this change.
- [ ] I added or updated automated tests for changed behavior, or explained why a test is not practical.
- [ ] I performed required manual verification for PTY, installer, updater, or visual changes.

## Compatibility and documentation

- [ ] I considered compatibility with existing `~/.cc-box` data, `CC_BOX_*` variables, and legacy theme IDs where relevant.
- [ ] I updated public documentation, examples, or release notes when behavior, configuration, or supported platforms changed.

## Security and release impact

- [ ] I did not include secrets, private paths, session content, Provider configuration, or unredacted diagnostics.
- [ ] I documented any change to permissions, command execution, file access, updater behavior, release assets, or security boundaries.
- [ ] I noted whether this change needs a release-note entry.
